seoTitle: Clear Creek vs Clearfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clear Creek and Clearfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clear Creek vs Clearfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clear Creek and Clearfield.
heading: Clear Creek vs Clearfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clear Creek, New South Wales and Clearfield, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clearfield has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Clear Creek (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clear Creek or Clearfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clear Creek has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Clearfield scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clear Creek scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Clearfield scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clear Creek or Clearfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clearfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
